product_overview: ng-vaule is an Angular 17+ drawer component library that ports the Vaul drawer experience to Angular using standalone components, signals-based state, and a11y-first behavior. It provides gesture-driven, snap-point, and direction-configurable drawers optimized for mobile and tablet.
core_goals: Provide a drop-in drawer component usable in any Angular 17+ app without NgModule setup
Deliver smooth drag-to-dismiss and snap-point gesture support with high performance on mid-range mobile devices
Achieve WCAG AA accessibility compliance for dialogs and focus management
Support all four directions (bottom, top, left, right) with correct animations
Support nested drawers (multiple simultaneous drawers) in demo scenarios
Maintain strict TypeScript (no runtime any/@ts-ignore) and OnPush-friendly APIs

features.name: Open/Close Drawer
features.description: Toggle the drawer open and closed and verify overlay, animation, and focus return behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Activate open/close trigger to set open=true -> Observe drawer animates in from the configured direction -> Observe overlay appears when modal=true -> Observe focus moves to the drawer's primary close control -> Activate drawer close control to set open=false -> Observe drawer animates out -> Observe overlay fades -> Observe focus returns to the original trigger
Navigate to / -> Ensure drawer is closed -> Attempt to close the drawer while closed -> Observe no state change (drawer remains closed)

features.name: Focus Management
features.description: Ensure focus is moved into the drawer when opened and returned to the trigger when closed, with sensible fallback when no internal focusables exist.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Activate open trigger to set open=true -> Observe focus moves to the drawer's primary close control (first focusable inside) -> Activate close control to set open=false -> Observe focus returns to the original trigger

Navigate to / -> Open drawer when no focusable elements exist inside -> Observe focus is assigned to the drawer root (fallback tabindex) -> Close drawer -> Observe focus returns to the original trigger

features.name: Snap Points Navigation
features.description: Move the drawer between configured snap points and verify the active snap point updates and behavior at boundaries.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the drawer -> Advance to the next snap point -> Observe drawer settles at the next configured snap point and activeSnapPoint updates -> Retreat to the previous snap point -> Observe drawer settles at the previous snap point and activeSnapPoint updates
Navigate to / -> Open the drawer at the last configured snap point -> Attempt to advance past the last snap point -> Observe drawer remains at the last snap point (no overflow)

features.name: Direction Control
features.description: Change the drawer slide-in direction and verify opening/closing animations match the selected direction.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a direction (bottom|top|left|right) in the control center -> Activate open trigger to set open=true -> Observe drawer slides in from the selected direction -> Close drawer -> Observe drawer slides out toward the selected direction
Navigate to / -> Select an unsupported direction value in the control center -> Activate open trigger -> Observe drawer falls back to the default direction (bottom) and opens

features.name: Dismissible Control
features.description: Toggle whether overlay click and Escape close the drawer and verify behavior when dismissible is on or off.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle dismissible off in the control center -> Open the drawer -> Press Escape -> Observe drawer remains open -> Toggle dismissible on -> Press Escape -> Observe drawer closes
Navigate to / -> Toggle dismissible off in the control center -> Open the drawer -> Click the overlay -> Observe drawer remains open

features.name: Snap Points Configuration
features.description: Configure custom snap points and verify the drawer uses those points when opened or dragged.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Update snap points in the control center to an ascending array of values -> Open the drawer -> Observe drawer snaps to the configured initial snap point -> Advance/retreat between snap points and observe positions correspond to configured values

Navigate to / -> Update snap points in the control center with an empty or unsorted array -> Open the drawer -> Observe snap-point logic is skipped and drawer opens to the default (fully open) position

features.name: Open/Close Drawer
features.description: Toggle the drawer open or closed via a button in the control center, Escape key, or the inner Close button
user_interactions: Click the open/close trigger button to toggle the drawer
Click the inner Close button to close the drawer
Press Escape to close the drawer when dismissible is true

features.name: Focus Management
features.description: When the drawer opens focus moves to the inner Close button; when it closes focus returns to the open/close trigger
user_interactions: Open the drawer and verify focus is on the inner Close button
Close the drawer and verify focus returns to the trigger button

features.name: Snap Points Navigation
features.description: Navigate between drawer snap points using Previous snap and Next snap buttons inside the drawer
user_interactions: Click Next snap button to advance to the next snap point
Click Previous snap button to go to the previous snap point

features.name: Direction Control
features.description: Change the drawer direction (bottom, top, left, right) from the control center
user_interactions: Select a direction from the control center
Observe the drawer slides in from the selected direction

features.name: Dismissible Control
features.description: Toggle whether pressing Escape or clicking the overlay closes the drawer
user_interactions: Toggle dismissible off in the control center
Press Escape and verify drawer stays open
Press Escape and verify drawer closes

features.name: Snap Points Configuration
features.description: Configure custom snap points via the control center
user_interactions: Update snap points in the control center
Open the drawer and verify it snaps to the configured points
